_comment: VEX - CVE false positive triage. To add entries, see Quality Corner or .github/WORKFLOWS.md#vex
author: n8n Security Team <security@n8n.io>

vulnerability.name: CVE-2025-32460
vulnerability.description: Heap-based buffer over-read in ReadJXLImage in coders/jxl.c in GraphicsMagick before 8e56520

statements.impact_statement: The JXL (JPEG XL) coder requires libjxl delegate to be compiled into GraphicsMagick. Alpine's graphicsmagick package (1.3.45-r0) does not include libjxl support. Verified via `gm convert -list format` which shows no JXL entry. The vulnerable ReadJXLImage code path is unreachable.

vulnerability.name: CVE-2025-27795
vulnerability.description: ReadJXLImage in JXL in GraphicsMagick before 1.3.46 lacks image dimension resource limits

statements.impact_statement: The JXL (JPEG XL) coder requires libjxl delegate to be compiled into GraphicsMagick. Alpine's graphicsmagick package (1.3.45-r0) does not include libjxl support. Verified via `gm convert -list format` which shows no JXL entry. The vulnerable ReadJXLImage code path is unreachable.

vulnerability.name: CVE-2025-27796
vulnerability.description: ReadWPGImage in WPG in GraphicsMagick before 1.3.46 mishandles palette buffer allocation

statements.action_statement: WPG (WordPerfect Graphics) coder is compiled into Alpine's graphicsmagick package. However, WPG is an obsolete format from the 1980s with no legitimate use case in n8n workflows. Exploitation requires a workflow author to deliberately fetch and process a crafted WPG file via the Edit Image node.

vulnerability.name: CVE-2026-27903
vulnerability.description: minimatch: Denial of Service due to unbounded recursive backtracking via crafted glob patterns

statements.impact_statement: This minimatch instance is bundled inside Node.js's own npm at /opt/nodejs/node-v24.13.1/lib/node_modules/npm/node_modules/minimatch. It is not imported or used by n8n application code. Will be resolved when Node.js ships an updated npm version.

vulnerability.name: CVE-2026-27904
vulnerability.description: minimatch: Denial of Service via catastrophic backtracking in glob expressions

statements.impact_statement: This minimatch instance is bundled inside Node.js's own npm at /opt/nodejs/node-v24.13.1/lib/node_modules/npm/node_modules/minimatch. It is not imported or used by n8n application code. Will be resolved when Node.js ships an updated npm version.

vulnerability.name: CVE-2026-29786
vulnerability.description: node-tar: path traversal vulnerability prior to version 7.5.10

statements.impact_statement: This tar instance is bundled inside Node.js's own npm at /opt/nodejs/node-v24.13.1/lib/node_modules/npm/node_modules/tar. It is not imported or used by n8n application code. Will be resolved when Node.js ships an updated npm version.
